1.premise: Tiny black ancestry is treated as full racial entitlement.
Being one-eighth black makes Black History Month personally claimable.

2.premise: Partial black ancestry tempts someone toward racial slurs without permission.
A failed sexual performance is reframed as a successful first time.

1.premise: Soft sex works through drunken persistence rather than impressive anatomy.

2.premise: An older drunk partner turns teenage virginity loss into predation.

lines.text: I found out recently I'm one-eighth black.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Now this doesn't mean that I can say any of the fun words,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I sure have been thinking about it.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I lost my virginity with a soft dick.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that's gotta take a hog to work, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: All it takes is a girl that believes deep enough
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: and keeps drinking after she pukes on ya.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I was 17, she was 22, she knew what she wanted.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Between me and Whiskey though, we figured it out.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All right, I wish that got bigger pop,
lines.label: fluff
